tasks.title: Implement Google Drive Time-Series State Database with Google Sheets API
tasks.description: Create append-only time-series database using Google Sheets API to track financial metrics evolution for delta intelligence calculations with automatic company-specific sheet creation and metric history tracking.
tasks.details: Implement enterprise-grade time-series state management using Google Sheets API v4 with 2025 best practices: 1) Create StateDatabase service using googleapis Node.js client v118+ with OAuth2 service account authentication and proper scopes (spreadsheets, drive.file). 2) Design schema with company-specific spreadsheets containing separate sheets for revenue_history, valuation_history, kpi_snapshots, and document_lineage with standardized column structures (timestamp, document_source, metric_value, unit, confidence, extracted_by, context). 3) Implement append-only operations using batchUpdate API for atomic multi-row insertions with proper error handling and retry logic using exponential backoff (max 3 retries, 2^n second delays). 4) Build MetricExtractor service with regex patterns for financial metrics (revenue: /revenue[:\s]*\$?([0-9,]+(?:\.[0-9]+)?)\s*([kmb]illion?|[kmb]|million?)?/i, valuation, ARR, burn_rate) with confidence scoring based on pattern match quality. 5) Create automatic spreadsheet provisioning for new companies with template-based sheet creation and proper sharing permissions. 6) Implement data validation with duplicate detection using content hashes and data integrity checks. 7) Add batch processing capabilities for handling multiple metric updates per document with transaction-like behavior using Google Sheets batch operations. 8) Include comprehensive error handling for API quotas (100 requests/100 seconds/user), network failures, and authentication token refresh with circuit breaker pattern. 9) Add monitoring and logging using structured logging (Winston or Pino) with performance metrics and API usage tracking.
tasks.testStrategy: Test Google Sheets API authentication with service account and proper scope validation, validate company-specific spreadsheet creation with template structure, test metric extraction accuracy with sample financial documents achieving >95% success rate on known patterns, verify append-only operations with concurrent access scenarios and race condition handling, test batch processing performance with 100+ metric updates, validate error handling with API quota exhaustion and network failures, test data integrity with duplicate detection and validation logic, benchmark API performance under load with proper rate limiting, verify monitoring and alerting functionality with comprehensive metrics collection.

tasks.title: Build Real-Time Delta Calculation Engine with Historical Context Integration
tasks.description: Implement real-time delta calculation system that compares new metrics against historical data to generate instant intelligence about metric changes, trends, and significance with smart alerting for PE teams.
tasks.details: Build enterprise delta intelligence engine using Node.js/TypeScript with real-time processing capabilities: 1) Create DeltaCalculationService that queries historical metrics from Google Sheets state database and calculates real-time deltas (absolute change, percentage change, time-period analysis) with statistical significance testing using t-tests for trend validation. 2) Implement HistoricalContextService that retrieves 6+ months of metric history and generates trend analysis (linear regression, seasonal patterns, volatility calculations) using mathjs or ml-matrix libraries for statistical computations. 3) Build AlertingEngine with configurable thresholds (default: >10% change or >$1M absolute change) and priority classification (high: >25% or >$5M, medium: 10-25% or $1-5M, low: 5-10% or $500K-1M) with exponential backoff for repeated alerts. 4) Create SignificanceAssessment module that evaluates metric changes against historical volatility and company context using z-score analysis and confidence intervals (95% confidence threshold). 5) Implement TrendDetectionAlgorithms including moving averages (SMA, EMA), momentum indicators, and pattern recognition for identifying acceleration/deceleration in growth rates. 6) Add CompanyBenchmarking service that compares metrics across portfolio companies for relative performance analysis with industry-adjusted scoring. 7) Build NotificationOrchestrator that routes alerts to appropriate stakeholders based on significance levels and company ownership structures with rate limiting (max 5 alerts/hour/company). 8) Implement caching layer using Redis for frequent metric lookups with 1-hour TTL and cache warming strategies for active companies. 9) Add comprehensive monitoring with processing time metrics (<30 seconds target), accuracy tracking, and alert effectiveness measurement.
tasks.testStrategy: Test delta calculation accuracy with known historical data scenarios and validate statistical significance testing, verify historical context retrieval with 6+ months of sample data and trend analysis accuracy, test alerting engine with various threshold configurations and priority classifications, validate significance assessment with statistical confidence intervals and z-score calculations, test trend detection algorithms with synthetic time-series data covering various patterns (growth, decline, volatility), verify company benchmarking accuracy with multi-company datasets, test notification orchestration with rate limiting and stakeholder routing logic, validate caching performance with high-frequency metric updates, benchmark processing speed achieving <30-second target for delta calculations, test error handling with missing historical data and API failures.

tasks.title: Enhance AI Agent Pipeline with Delta Intelligence and Historical Context
tasks.description: Upgrade existing 5 AI agents (Executive Summary, Financial Analysis, Market Analysis, Investment Thesis, Recommendation) plus new State Analysis Agent to process delta intelligence and historical context for more informed investment analysis.
tasks.details: Enhance AI agent pipeline with delta intelligence capabilities using latest LLM models: 1) Upgrade existing AI agents to GPT-4o-2024-11-20 or Claude-3.5-Sonnet-20241022 for optimal 2025 performance with proper API key rotation and fallback mechanisms. 2) Create new StateAnalysisAgent specialized in delta intelligence with prompts optimized for metric change analysis: 'Analyze {companyName} metric changes: {deltaData}. Historical context: {historicalTrends}. What caused changes? Significance? Investigate priorities? Valuation impact?' with structured output parsing. 3) Modify existing agents to consume delta intelligence: ExecutiveSummaryAgent integrates metric changes into company overview, FinancialAnalysisAgent incorporates trend analysis, MarketAnalysisAgent correlates market changes with performance deltas, InvestmentThesisAgent updates thesis based on metric evolution, RecommendationAgent adjusts recommendations with delta-driven insights. 4) Implement ContextualPromptEngineering that dynamically injects relevant historical data, delta intelligence, and company-specific context into agent prompts with token optimization for maximum context utilization. 5) Build ProgressiveAnalysisFramework where each agent builds upon previous agent outputs while incorporating new delta intelligence, creating compound insights through agent coordination. 6) Add AgentOutputValidation with structured response parsing, confidence scoring, and quality assessment to ensure consistent output formats and actionable insights. 7) Implement AgentCoordinationService that manages execution order, passes context between agents, and handles partial failures with graceful degradation. 8) Create ResponseSynthesizer that combines all agent outputs with delta intelligence into coherent analysis reports with proper citation of metric changes and historical trends. 9) Add comprehensive monitoring with agent response times, success rates, and output quality metrics with alerting for degraded performance.
tasks.testStrategy: Test enhanced agents with sample delta intelligence data and validate improved analysis quality compared to baseline, verify StateAnalysisAgent accuracy with various metric change scenarios and historical context integration, validate agent coordination with sequential processing and context passing between agents, test progressive analysis framework with incremental document additions showing compound insight improvement, verify contextual prompt engineering with optimal token utilization and relevant context injection, test agent output validation with structured response parsing and confidence scoring accuracy, validate response synthesis quality combining multiple agent outputs with delta intelligence, benchmark agent response times with target <2 minutes per agent, test error handling with agent failures and graceful degradation scenarios, verify monitoring system with comprehensive metrics collection and performance alerting.

tasks.title: Implement Advanced Document Processing with Metric Extraction Engine
tasks.description: Build comprehensive document processing pipeline that extracts structured data and financial metrics from PDF, Excel, Word, and PowerPoint documents with intelligent parsing and confidence scoring.
tasks.details: Implement advanced document processing microservices using Python 3.11+ with FastAPI framework: 1) Create DocumentTypeDetector using python-magic and file signature analysis with MIME type validation and confidence scoring (>95% accuracy target). 2) Build PDFProcessor using PyMuPDF (fitz) for superior text extraction, camelot-py for table extraction, and easyocr for OCR on scanned documents with layout analysis using pdfplumber for structured content parsing. 3) Implement ExcelProcessor using openpyxl for .xlsx files and xlrd for .xls compatibility, with automatic sheet detection, formula evaluation, and data type inference for financial metrics. 4) Create WordProcessor using python-docx with table extraction, header/paragraph parsing, and metadata extraction including tracked changes and comments. 5) Build PowerPointProcessor using python-pptx for slide content extraction, notes parsing, and embedded chart data extraction with image metadata analysis. 6) Develop MetricExtractionEngine with advanced regex patterns for financial metrics: revenue (/(?:total\s+)?(?:net\s+)?revenue[:\s]*[$]?([0-9,.]+)(?:\s*([kmbt])?(?:illion)?)?/gi), profit margins (/(?:gross|net|operating)\s+margin[:\s]*([0-9.]+)%/gi), growth rates (/(?:revenue|sales)\s+growth[:\s]*([0-9.-]+)%/gi) with context-aware validation and unit normalization. 7) Implement ConfidenceScoring based on pattern match quality, document structure, and extraction consistency with machine learning model for accuracy prediction. 8) Add DocumentSanitization with virus scanning using ClamAV, content validation, and suspicious content detection. 9) Create AsyncProcessingQueue using Celery with Redis backend for handling large documents and batch processing with progress tracking and result caching (24-hour TTL).
tasks.testStrategy: Test document type detection with comprehensive file format samples including corrupted files, validate PDF processing with complex layouts, tables, and scanned documents achieving >90% text extraction accuracy, test Excel processing with multi-sheet workbooks, formulas, and various data types, verify Word processing with tables, embedded objects, and complex formatting, test PowerPoint extraction with various slide layouts and embedded content, validate metric extraction with financial documents achieving >95% accuracy on known patterns, test confidence scoring correlation with actual accuracy on validation dataset, verify document sanitization with malware samples and suspicious content detection, validate async processing performance with concurrent document uploads, benchmark processing speed targets: PDF <30s, Excel <15s, Word <10s, PowerPoint <20s per document.

tasks.title: Build Smart Notification System with Priority-Based Alerting
tasks.description: Create intelligent notification system that sends priority-based alerts for significant metric changes, document updates, and analysis completion with configurable stakeholder routing and delivery confirmation.
tasks.details: Implement enterprise notification system with intelligent routing and delivery confirmation: 1) Create NotificationClassificationEngine that categorizes alerts by urgency: CRITICAL (>25% metric change or >$5M), URGENT (10-25% or $1-5M), HIGH (5-10% or $500K-1M), NORMAL (document updates), LOW (routine processing) with custom thresholds per company/metric. 2) Build StakeholderRoutingService with role-based delivery: Partners receive CRITICAL/URGENT, Analysts receive HIGH+, Team receives all levels, with escalation paths for unacknowledged critical alerts (15-minute escalation window). 3) Implement MultiChannelDelivery supporting email (SendGrid API), Slack (Webhook API), SMS (Twilio API), and push notifications with delivery preference management per stakeholder. 4) Create NotificationTemplateEngine using Handlebars.js with dynamic content: metric change summaries, historical context, document impact analysis, and actionable next steps with personalized greetings and company-specific branding. 5) Build DeliveryConfirmationTracker with read receipts, click tracking, and response monitoring using webhook callbacks and tracking pixels with 48-hour follow-up for unacknowledged critical alerts. 6) Add RateLimiting service preventing notification spam: max 5 critical alerts/hour/company, 10 urgent/hour, 20 high/hour with intelligent batching for multiple simultaneous changes. 7) Implement NotificationScheduler with timezone-aware delivery (business hours only for non-critical), quiet hours configuration (no notifications 10pm-7am), and weekend/holiday handling with emergency override capabilities. 8) Create NotificationAnalytics tracking delivery rates, open rates, response times, and effectiveness metrics with dashboard reporting for optimization insights. 9) Add comprehensive error handling with retry logic, fallback delivery methods, and dead letter queues for failed notifications.
tasks.testStrategy: Test notification classification with various metric change scenarios and validate appropriate urgency assignment, verify stakeholder routing with different role configurations and escalation paths, test multi-channel delivery across email, Slack, SMS with delivery confirmation accuracy, validate notification templates with dynamic content rendering and personalization, test delivery confirmation tracking with read receipts and response monitoring, verify rate limiting effectiveness preventing spam while ensuring critical alerts are delivered, test timezone-aware scheduling with business hours and quiet hours configurations, validate analytics tracking with accurate metrics collection and reporting, test error handling with failed deliveries and retry logic, benchmark notification delivery speed with target <2 minutes for critical alerts.

tasks.title: Create Living Analysis Report System with Version Control
tasks.description: Build dynamic report generation system that creates version-controlled analysis reports showing document impact, metric evolution, and progressive analysis enhancement with visual delta intelligence dashboards.
tasks.details: Implement comprehensive report generation system with version control and change tracking: 1) Create ReportVersioningService using PostgreSQL with semantic versioning (major.minor.patch) for tracking significant analysis changes, document additions, and metric updates with complete audit trail and diff capabilities. 2) Build DynamicReportGenerator using React.js/Next.js with server-side rendering that combines AI agent outputs, delta intelligence, and historical context into comprehensive investment analysis reports with interactive visualizations. 3) Implement ChangeVisualizationEngine using Chart.js/D3.js for creating metric evolution charts, trend analysis graphs, confidence interval plots, and document impact timelines with drill-down capabilities and hover tooltips. 4) Create ReportTemplateSystem with customizable layouts: Executive Summary template, Detailed Analysis template, Delta Focus template, and Custom templates with drag-drop section arrangement and company branding. 5) Build DocumentImpactAnalysis that shows how each new document influenced the analysis with before/after comparisons, confidence score changes, and narrative evolution tracking using text similarity algorithms. 6) Implement ReportDistributionPipeline with automated PDF generation using Puppeteer, email distribution with attachment management, and web-based report sharing with access control and expiration dates. 7) Add CollaborationFeatures including comment systems, approval workflows, and stakeholder feedback collection with version-specific discussions and resolution tracking. 8) Create ReportAnalytics measuring report engagement (time spent, sections viewed, downloads), stakeholder feedback scores, and decision impact tracking with effectiveness metrics. 9) Implement CachingStrategy using Redis for frequently accessed reports with smart cache invalidation when new data becomes available and pre-generation of high-priority reports.
tasks.testStrategy: Test report versioning with multiple document additions and validate proper version increment logic, verify dynamic report generation with comprehensive analysis content and proper formatting, test change visualization accuracy with metric evolution charts and trend analysis, validate report templates with customizable layouts and company branding, test document impact analysis showing before/after comparisons and confidence changes, verify distribution pipeline with PDF generation quality and email delivery, test collaboration features with comment systems and approval workflows, validate report analytics with engagement tracking and effectiveness measurement, test caching performance with smart invalidation and pre-generation strategies, benchmark report generation speed with target <60 seconds for comprehensive reports.

tasks.title: Implement Company Portfolio Comparison and Benchmarking System
tasks.description: Build cross-company analysis system that enables portfolio-wide metric comparison, relative performance benchmarking, and industry-adjusted scoring for strategic portfolio insights.
tasks.details: Create portfolio-wide comparison and benchmarking system: 1) Build PortfolioAnalyticsEngine that aggregates metrics across all companies in the time-series state database with data normalization for different company sizes, industries, and reporting periods using statistical standardization techniques. 2) Implement CompanyBenchmarking service using quartile analysis, percentile rankings, and peer group identification based on industry, revenue size, and growth stage with automatic peer group updates. 3) Create IndustryAdjustment algorithms that normalize metrics against industry benchmarks using external data sources (Crunchbase API, SEC filings, industry reports) with periodic recalibration and confidence intervals. 4) Build RelativePerformanceScoring with weighted metrics calculation: revenue growth (30%), profitability (25%), market position (20%), efficiency metrics (15%), risk factors (10%) with customizable weighting per portfolio strategy. 5) Implement TrendAnalysisComparison that identifies portfolio-wide patterns, outlier companies, and correlation analysis between company performances with statistical significance testing. 6) Create PortfolioDashboard using React.js with interactive charts showing portfolio distribution, performance heat maps, trend correlation matrices, and drill-down capabilities with real-time updates. 7) Add AlertingSystem for portfolio-level events: new top performer identification, concerning performance divergence, and portfolio risk concentration with automatic stakeholder notifications. 8) Implement ExportCapabilities for portfolio reports in multiple formats (PDF, Excel, PowerPoint) with customizable templates and scheduled distribution to limited partners and stakeholders. 9) Create APIEndpoints for third-party integrations with existing PE firm systems, CRM platforms, and reporting tools with proper authentication and rate limiting.
tasks.testStrategy: Test portfolio analytics with multi-company datasets and validate data normalization accuracy, verify company benchmarking with quartile analysis and peer group identification, test industry adjustment algorithms with external data integration and confidence intervals, validate relative performance scoring with weighted metrics and customizable weighting, test trend analysis comparison with statistical significance and correlation analysis, verify portfolio dashboard functionality with interactive visualizations and real-time updates, test alerting system with portfolio-level event detection and stakeholder notifications, validate export capabilities with multiple formats and scheduled distribution, test API endpoints with authentication, rate limiting, and third-party integration compatibility.

tasks.title: Build Advanced Security and Audit System for Financial Data
tasks.description: Implement comprehensive security framework with encryption, audit logging, access control, and compliance features for handling sensitive PE financial documents and analysis data.
tasks.details: Implement enterprise-grade security and compliance framework: 1) Create DataEncryption service using AES-256-GCM for at-rest encryption of sensitive financial data in PostgreSQL with field-level encryption for PII/financial metrics and key rotation using AWS KMS or Google Cloud KMS with automatic 90-day rotation. 2) Build AccessControlSystem with role-based permissions (Admin, Partner, Analyst, Viewer) and attribute-based access control (ABAC) for company-specific data isolation with multi-factor authentication using TOTP/FIDO2. 3) Implement ComprehensiveAuditLogging capturing all data access, modifications, and system events with immutable log storage using blockchain-based verification or AWS CloudTrail with 7-year retention policy. 4) Create DataLineageTracking that maintains complete chain of custody for financial metrics from document source through analysis to report generation with cryptographic signatures and timestamps. 5) Build ComplianceFramework supporting SOC2 Type II, ISO 27001, and GDPR requirements with automated compliance checks, policy enforcement, and reporting dashboards with quarterly compliance attestation. 6) Implement DataResidency controls ensuring data remains in specified jurisdictions with geographic restrictions and cross-border transfer monitoring using geolocation validation. 7) Add ThreatDetection with anomaly detection for unusual access patterns, failed authentication monitoring, and behavioral analysis using machine learning models with real-time alerting. 8) Create DataRetentionPolicies with automated archival, secure deletion capabilities, and right-to-be-forgotten implementation with cryptographic proof of deletion. 9) Build SecurityDashboard with real-time threat monitoring, compliance status tracking, audit report generation, and incident response workflows with integration to SIEM systems.
tasks.testStrategy: Test data encryption with field-level encryption validation and key rotation verification, validate access control system with role-based permissions and multi-factor authentication, test audit logging completeness with immutable storage and event tracking, verify data lineage tracking with cryptographic signatures and chain of custody, validate compliance framework with SOC2/ISO27001 controls and automated checks, test data residency controls with geographic restrictions and transfer monitoring, verify threat detection with anomaly identification and behavioral analysis, test data retention policies with secure deletion and proof of deletion, validate security dashboard with real-time monitoring and incident response workflows.

tasks.title: Implement System Performance Monitoring and Optimization Framework
tasks.description: Build comprehensive monitoring system with performance metrics, health checks, alert management, and automated optimization for production-scale deployment with SLA compliance tracking.
tasks.details: Create enterprise monitoring and optimization framework: 1) Build ApplicationPerformanceMonitoring (APM) using Prometheus metrics collection, Grafana dashboards, and New Relic/DataDog integration with custom metrics for document processing times, AI agent response times, database query performance, and API endpoint latency with 95th percentile tracking. 2) Implement HealthCheckFramework with deep health checks for all system components: database connectivity, external API availability, Redis cache performance, Google Drive API quotas, AI model endpoints with automated failover and circuit breaker patterns. 3) Create AlertManagement system using AlertManager with intelligent alert routing, escalation policies, and on-call scheduling with PagerDuty integration and alert fatigue prevention through intelligent grouping and suppression. 4) Build PerformanceOptimization engine with automated query optimization, cache warming strategies, connection pool tuning, and resource scaling recommendations based on usage patterns and performance metrics. 5) Implement SLAMonitoring with service level objectives: document processing <5 minutes (95%), AI analysis <10 minutes (95%), system uptime >99.9%, API response time <2 seconds (95%) with automated SLA reporting and breach notifications. 6) Create ResourceUsageTracking for CPU, memory, disk I/O, network bandwidth, and API quota consumption with predictive scaling recommendations and cost optimization insights. 7) Add ErrorTracking and debugging tools with distributed tracing using Jaeger/Zipkin, error aggregation using Sentry, and log analysis with structured logging and correlation IDs. 8) Build CapacityPlanningDashboard with usage trend analysis, growth projections, and infrastructure scaling recommendations with cost impact analysis and approval workflows. 9) Implement AutomatedOptimization with self-healing capabilities, performance tuning recommendations, and proactive maintenance scheduling based on system metrics and usage patterns.
tasks.testStrategy: Test APM with comprehensive metrics collection and dashboard visualization accuracy, validate health check framework with component failure scenarios and automated failover, test alert management with intelligent routing and escalation policies, verify performance optimization with automated query tuning and scaling recommendations, validate SLA monitoring with service level tracking and breach notifications, test resource usage tracking with predictive scaling and cost optimization, verify error tracking with distributed tracing and error aggregation, test capacity planning with growth projections and scaling recommendations, validate automated optimization with self-healing capabilities and maintenance scheduling.

tasks.title: Create Production Deployment and DevOps Pipeline
tasks.description: Build complete DevOps infrastructure with CI/CD pipelines, containerization, infrastructure as code, and blue-green deployment for zero-downtime production deployment with comprehensive testing and monitoring.
tasks.details: Implement comprehensive DevOps and deployment infrastructure: 1) Create ContainerizationStrategy using Docker with multi-stage builds for Node.js/Python services, Alpine Linux base images for security, and proper layer caching for build optimization with image size <500MB per service. 2) Build KubernetesDeployment using Helm charts with HorizontalPodAutoscaler for automatic scaling, resource limits/requests optimization, health checks, and rolling updates with proper service mesh integration using Istio. 3) Implement InfrastructureAsCode using Terraform for cloud resource provisioning (AWS/GCP/Azure) with module-based architecture, state management, and environment-specific configurations with automated drift detection. 4) Create CI/CDPipeline using GitHub Actions or GitLab CI with automated testing (unit, integration, security), code quality checks (ESLint, SonarQube), dependency vulnerability scanning, and automated deployment with approval gates. 5) Build BlueGreenDeployment strategy with traffic shifting, automated rollback triggers, and zero-downtime deployment validation with canary releases for critical updates and A/B testing capabilities. 6) Implement SecretsManagement using HashiCorp Vault or cloud-native solutions (AWS Secrets Manager, Google Secret Manager) with automatic secret rotation, encryption at rest/in-transit, and audit logging. 7) Add DatabaseMigration automation with schema versioning, rollback capabilities, and data migration validation with zero-downtime migration strategies for production environments. 8) Create MonitoringIntegration with deployment tracking, performance impact analysis, and automated rollback triggers based on error rates, latency increases, or custom SLI violations. 9) Build DisasterRecovery procedures with automated backups, cross-region replication, RTO/RPO targets (RTO: <30 minutes, RPO: <5 minutes), and regular disaster recovery testing with documentation and runbooks.
tasks.testStrategy: Test containerization with multi-stage builds and security scanning, validate Kubernetes deployment with autoscaling and rolling updates, test infrastructure as code with multi-environment provisioning and drift detection, verify CI/CD pipeline with automated testing and quality gates, test blue-green deployment with traffic shifting and automated rollback, validate secrets management with rotation and encryption, test database migration with zero-downtime strategies, verify monitoring integration with deployment tracking and automated rollback, test disaster recovery procedures with RTO/RPO targets and recovery validation.
